sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 커민스는 2분기 매출 86억 달러와 주당순이익 6.43달러를 기록하며 전력 시스템 부문의 수익성 개선을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 전력 시스템 및 유통 부문의 기록적인 수익성에 힘입어 2분기 EBITDA는 매출의 18.4%인 16억 달러를 기록했습니다.
주주 가치 제고를 위해 분기별 보통주 현금 배당금을 기존 1.82달러에서 2.00달러로 인상했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 도심 환경의 전력 수요 증가에 대응하기 위해 최대 1메가와트 출력을 제공하는 S17 Centum 발전기 플랫폼을 출시했습니다.
전력 발전 장비에 대한 수요는 견고하나, 트럭 등 경제 민감도가 높은 시장에서는 최종 사용자 신뢰도가 하락하며 수요가 감소하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2분기 매출은 86억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 2% 감소했습니다.
순이익은 8억 9,000만 달러(주당 6.43달러)로 전년 동기 7억 2,600만 달러(주당 5.26달러) 대비 증가했습니다.
엔진 부문 매출은 29억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 8% 감소했으며, 부문 EBITDA는 4억 달러를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 경제 및 규제 불확실성이 지속됨에 따라 하반기 트럭 시장 등 경제 민감 부문의 수요 위축이 실적에 미칠 영향 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Cummins Reports Second Quarter 2025 Results • Second quarter revenues of $8.6 billion; GAAP 1 Net Income of $890 million, or 10.3% of sales • EBITDA in the second quarter was 18.4% of sales; Diluted EPS of $6.43 COLUMBUS, IND. - Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI) today reported results for the second quarter of 2025. “We delivered strong second quarter results, driven by record profitability in our Power Systems and Distribution segments,” said Jennifer Rumsey, Chair and CEO. “Our employees’ resilience and commitment continue to power our success in a dynamic environment. We see a contrast across our markets with robust demand for power generation equipment supported by clear secular drivers, and our more economically sensitive markets, such as truck, where end-user confidence has declined. This contrast will become even more pronounced in the second half of the year as No  Normalized numeric aliases: $8.6 billion = 86억 달러; $890 million = 8억 9,000만 달러; $8.6 = 8.6달러; $890 = 890달러; $6.43 = 6.43달러.

ates decline sharply, starting in the third quarter. Aftermarket demand for parts and service remains stable.” Second quarter revenues of $8.6 billion decreased 2% from the same quarter in 2024. Sales in North America declined 6%, and international revenues increased 5% due to higher demand in Europe and China. Net income attributable to Cummins in the second quarter was $890 million, or $6.43 per diluted share, compared to $726 million, or $5.26 per diluted share, in 2024. Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization (EBITDA) in the second quarter were $1.6 billion, or 18.4% of sales, compared to $1.3 billion, or 15.3% of sales, a year ago. 2025 Outlook: Due to continued economic uncertainty, the company will not   Normalized numeric aliases: $8.6 billion = 86억 달러; $890 million = 8억 9,000만 달러; $726 million = 7억 2,600만 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $1.3 billion = 13억 달러; $8.6 = 8.6달러; $890 = 890달러; $6.43 = 6.43달러; $5.26 = 5.26달러; $726 = 726달러; $1.6 = 1.6달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러.

e enabled us to navigate recent industry challenges,” said Rumsey. “However, persistent economic and regulatory uncertainty continues to impact a number of our key markets and cloud our near-term outlook for both business and market performance. We remain focused on delivering for our customers and look forward to providing additional clarity as this uncertainty subsides.” Second Quarter 2025 Highlights: • Cummins announced an increase in the quarterly common stock cash dividend from $1.82 to $2.00 per share. The company has increased the quarterly dividend to shareholders for 16 consecutive years. 1 • Cummins launched the new 17-liter engine platform generator, expanding on the success of the acclaimed Centum™ Series generator sets. Producing up to 1 megawatt of power, the S17 Centum genset was developed to produce a large power output within a compact footprint to meet the growing dema  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.82 = 1.82달러; $2.00 = 2.00달러.

nds of power in urban environments. The new genset is designed to support a wide range of critical market segments such as commercial properties, healthcare facilities and water treatment plants. • Jennifer Rumsey was named one of Barron’s Top CEOs of 2025. Jennifer was recognized for her visionary leadership and commitment to innovation and sustainability. The annual list features 26 leaders whose deft guidance has put their companies in a stronger competitive position. Second quarter 2025 detail (all comparisons to same period in 2024): Engine Segment • Sales - $2.9 billion, down 8% • Segment EBITDA - $400 million, or 13.8% of sales, compared to $445 million, or 14.1% of sales • Revenues decreased 8% in North America and 7% in international markets due to lower on-highway demand in the Unite  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.9 billion = 29억 달러; $400 million = 4억 달러; $445 million = 4억 4,500만 달러; $2.7 billion = 27억 달러; $2.9 = 2.9달러; $400 = 400달러; $445 = 445달러; $2.7 = 2.7달러; $397 = 397달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
